stonetop.summary: Cat-sized red insects that swarm and burst with acid.

system.concept: Cat-sized red insects that swarm and burst with acid.
system.description: Red-shelled insects that look like a cross between an ant and a beetle, but the size of a small cat. They form colonies a few-hundred large, typically on higher ground, harvesting all the dead grass in a few miles, hibernating through winter, then relocating in spring to a part of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.nBvsH19B1bG2d4Di]{Flats} that hasn't burned or been harvested in years. They mostly ignore people and large animals, but they'll swarm if threatened.
